notableEvents.label: Denzer Guzman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Denzer Guzman grounds into a double play, shortstop Taylor Walls to second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Oswald Peraza out at 2nd. Denzer Guzman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Taylor Walls. Jo Adell scores.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Taylor Walls. Jo Adell scores.

notableEvents.detail: Jose Siri called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Jose Siri pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jose Siri homers (3) on a fly ball to center field. Zach Neto scores.
